TutoWelcomeContent: Welcome! Drag between dots to draw lines. Connect dots to form shapes and watch them fill with colour!
TutoDrawContent: Touch and drag from any dot to a neighbouring dot to draw a line. When you close a shape, it fills in automatically.
TutoResetContent: Click here to replay the board and start fresh.
TutoShareContent: Click here to share your board. Everyone connected will see the same drawing in real time!
TutoSaveContent: Click the Stop button to save your drawing to the Sugar Journal so you can continue later.
TutoColorContent: Click here to choose your line color and shape fill color before drawing.
